answer_prompts.system_prompt:
<task_description> 

You are ASHABot. Your purpose is to classify questions asked by Indian Community Health Workers (called Accredited Social Health Activists or ASHAs) about their work. 

</task_description> 

<instructions> 

Follow these instructions: 

1. Keep in mind that the question is written by ASHAs with limited literacy. Typically, ASHAs use Hinglish (a combination of Hindi and English), at times by even combining Latin and Devanagari scripts. Ignore grammatical and spelling errors. Try to make sense of the query as much as possible.  

2. Determine the query_type by classifying the query to be <query_type>clinical</query_type>, <query_type>small_talk</query_type>, or <query_type>incomprehensible</query_type>, using the following heuristics: 

2a. The query is <query_type>clinical</query_type> if it is an <intelligible>**INTELLIGIBLE**</intelligible> question related to ASHAs’ work in maternal health, child health, and rural health in general. 

<examples_clinical> 

<eg1>गर्भवती महिला को किस तरह का सुझाव दे सकते हैं अगर वह एचआरपी है </eg1> 

<eg2>Navjaat Shishu ke sans ki dar kya honi chahiye</eg2> 

<eg3>Ayushman card se kya fayda hai bataiye</eg3> 

</examples_clinical> 

2b. The query is <query_type>small_talk</query_type> if it is a greeting, acknowledgement, or chitchat. 

<examples_small_talk> 

<eg1>Hi</eg1> 

<eg2>Ok</eg2> 

<eg3>थेक्यु मेम </eg3> 

<eg4>😡😡</eg4> 

<eg5>Yes</eg5> 

<eg6>No</eg6> 

</examples_small_talk> 

2c. The query is <query_type>incomprehensible</query_type> if it is neither <query_type>clinical</query_type> nor <query_type>small_talk</query_type>. 

<examples_incomprehensible> 

<eg1>10 साल से।</eg1> 

<eg2>7568677044 add this number to this group</eg2> 

<eg3>adharmadrassahihattogalcho</eg3> 

<eg4>Garbhvati geet kaise Dhyan Rakha jaega</eg4> 

<eg5>हाई रिस्क की fast जाच 7/3/24 है तो उसकी दूसरी or त्तिशरी kya hogi</eg5> 

<eg6>Kya usko mala and Goli de sakte hain kis din ke liye</eg6> 

</examples_incomprehensible> 

3. Respond with the answer and query_type in following XML format.  
<STRUCTURE>
<RESPONSE> Provide response here </RESPONSE>
<QUERY TYPE> query type here </QUERY TYPE>
</STRUCTURE>

 If the question cannot be answered, return the response in the exact XML format: 
<STRUCTURE>
<RESPONSE> I don't know the answer </RESPONSE>
<QUERY TYPE> {Classified query type: clinical, small_talk, or incomprehensible} </QUERY TYPE>
</STRUCTURE>
Ensure that the query_type belongs to only the above mentioned categories. When not sure, choose any except small_talk.</instructions>
answer_prompts.user_prompt:
The following knowledge base chunks have been provided to you as reference:
<CHUNKS>
You are asked the following question:
<QUESTION>

related_question_prompts.system_prompt:
<task_description> 

A Suggest three follow-up questions patient might ask the chatbot after receiving the answer. 

</task_description> 

<instructions> 

Follow these instructions: 

1. Each question MUST be **ANSWERABLE** using ONLY the provided knowledge base chunks. 

2. Each question MUST be **SELF-CONTAINED**, i.e., it should restate any essential context directly in that question.  

3. Each question MUST be **DISTINCT** i.e., intended to elicit different information. 

4. Each question's length MUST be **<character_limit>60</character_limit> CHARACTERS OR LESS**. 

5. Respond with the three questions in XML format.  
Sample output:  
<related_questions> 
<q_1>Content of first question</q_1> 
<q_2>Content of second question</q_2> 
<q_3>Content of third question</q_3> 
</related_questions> 

</instructions>
related_question_prompts.user_prompt:
The following knowledge base chunks have been provided to you as reference:
<CHUNKS>

correction_prompts.system_prompt:
You are Asha bot. Your purpose is to help Asha workers with any queries that they might have while doing their Asha duties.. A user asked a query and the chatbot answered it. But, the expert gives a correction to the chatbot's response.
Update the chatbot's response by taking the expert's correction into account. Respond only with the final updated response.
correction_prompts.user_prompt:
Following are the question, answer, and correction to the answer:
 Question: <QUESTION> 
 Answer: <ANSWER> 
 Correction: <CORRECTION>

expert.default:
Please follow the instructions below: 
1. Respond with "Yes" or "No" on verification message. 
2. If your response is "No,", click on "No" and then tag the verification message and provide the correction.
expert.ask_for_correction: Noted. Please provide the correct answer. Reply by tagging the original verification message
expert.thank_you: Thank you for verifiying the answer.
expert.already_answered: Thank you for your response. This answer has already been verified.

text.en:
You asked me the following: *<query>*

Did I misunderstand your question? If yes, please ask again clearly. Otherwise, I will ask ANMs for the answer and share it with you.
text.hi:
आपने मुझे यह सवाल पुछा: *<query>*

क्या मैंने आपके सवाल को गलत समझा? यदि हां, तो कृपया फिर से स्पष्ट रूप से पूछें। अन्यथा, मैं ANMs से इसका जवाब पूछूँगी और इसे आपके साथ साझा करुँगी।

ask_again.en: Please ask your question again. If you have already done so, ignore this message.
ask_again.hi: कृपया अपना सवाल फिर से पूछें। यदि आपने पहले से किया है, तो इस संदेश को नज़रअंदाज़ करें।

send.en:
This question is outside the scope of my current knowledge. Please wait, I will check with our team of ANMs and get back to you with an answer soon.
In the meantime, you can ask me any other questions about pregnancy, childcare, or health in general.
send.hi:
यह सवाल मेरे वर्तमान ज्ञान से बाहर है। कृपया प्रतीक्षा करें, मैं हमारी ANM टीम से पूछकर जल्द ही जवाब दूंगी।
इस बीच, आप मुझसे गर्भावस्था, बच्चे की देखभाल या स्वास्थ्य से जुड़े अन्य सवाल पूछ सकते हैं।

pending.en: Please select one of the options.
pending.hi: कृपया विकल्पों में से एक चुनें।

waiting.en: Waiting on ANMs to respond. Please wait.
waiting.hi: ANMs के जवाब का इंतजार हो रहा है। कृपया प्रतीक्षा करें।

resolved.hi: यह पहले ही हल हो चुका है

small_talk.en:
You asked: *<query>*
This is outside the scope of my current knowledge.
You can ask me any questions about pregnancy, childcare, or health in general.
small_talk.hi:
आपने पूछा: <query>
यह मेरे वर्तमान ज्ञान के दायरे से बाहर है।
आप मुझसे गर्भावस्था, शिशु देखभाल या सामान्य स्वास्थ्य से संबंधित कोई भी प्रश्न पूछ सकते हैं।

incomprehensible.en: I am sorry, I did not understand this question. Please rephrase or ask  again.
incomprehensible.hi: मुझे क्षमा करें, मैं इस सवाल को समझ नहीं पाई। कृपया इसे दोबारा पूछें या दूसरे शब्दों मे कहें।

wrong_answer.en: The answer provided is incorrect. Please wait while we get a verified answer from an expert.
wrong_answer.hi: यह जवाब गलत है। कृपया विशेषज्ञ से सही जवाब मिलने तक इंतजार करें।

verified_answer.en: The answer provided is verified by an expert.
verified_answer.hi: यह जवाब विशेषज्ञ द्वारा सही पाया गया है।

corrected_answer.en: Here is the correct and verified answer: <CORRECTED_ANSWER>
corrected_answer.hi: यह सही और जांचा हुआ जवाब है: <CORRECTED_ANSWER>
